candidateFindings.pageTitle: Visiting Students | Pritzker School of Medicine
candidateFindings.shortQuote: Visiting students can remain eight weeks without charge. $26 fee for student wellness service. $28.00 for 6-24 hours parking.

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: International lane is restricted to 'US-affiliated medical schools located in other countries' — not all international applicants are eligible. Faculty sponsor required.
negativeEvidence.weakNegativeEvidence: Visa policy absent. International cost may differ from US (not stated).

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) SCHOOL_LEVEL_SOURCE — Pritzker hub; (b) US LCME/COCA fourth-year only via VSLO; (c) international lane is conditional (US-affiliated foreign schools + faculty sponsor); (d) 8 weeks free + $26 wellness; (e) housing not provided.
plainEnglishSummary: University of Chicago Pritzker SOM accepts visiting fourth-year medical students from US LCME or COCA-accredited schools via VSLO. No tuition for up to 8 weeks; $26 student wellness fee. International students are accepted from 'US-affiliated medical schools located in other countries' only, with a required faculty sponsor — not an open international pathway. Housing not provided.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because IL gained a P101 packet with the no-tuition-8-weeks finding (notable cost difference vs other AMCs) and an explicit but RESTRICTED international lane (US-affiliated foreign schools only).
